string.text:
A Belgian-made assault rifle designed for special forces. It uses 7.62x51mm NATO rounds, providing high damage and penetration. Equipped with a Picatinny rail, allowing a wide range of attachments. Known for high reliability and accuracy, but has considerable weight and recoil. 

 %c[ui_gray_2]ATTACHMENTS: 
 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] 7.62x51mm suppressors

 %c[d_purple] • %c[ui_gray_2] Optics: all scopes compatible with Picatinny rail mounting.
